proposal1.heroHeadline: Seeaoc is losing 2,000 hours a year on manual proposals. This is where it hurts.
proposal1.heroSubheadline: Your manual proposal process is costing precious hours. Our system delivers client-ready proposals in 47 seconds, freeing your time for innovation.
proposal1.problemsIntro: Each problem outlined below is an ongoing drain on your resources and potential.

problems.title: Time Drain
problems.description: Manually crafting proposals eats up 2,000 hours annually. Those are hours not spent optimizing your AI systems or acquiring new clients.

problems.title: Lost Deals
problems.description: Delayed proposals mean lost opportunities. Every day waiting for a proposal is a day a competitor could close the deal.

problems.title: Inconsistency Costs
problems.description: Varied proposal quality can lose client trust. Inconsistencies undermine your brand, costing potential long-term partnerships.

problems.title: Operational Expense
problems.description: Spending $100,000 annually on proposal-related labor is unsustainable. This money could enhance your AI development framework instead.

problems.title: Brand Dilution
problems.description: Each off-brand proposal weakens your market position. It signals a lack of focus which can erode client confidence.

problems.title: Data Unutilized
problems.description: Valuable client insights are underused. This is data that could personalize proposals, thus boosting your conversion rates.

proposal1.solutionIntro: Our AI automation system replaces all these costly inefficiencies.

solutions.title: Instant Proposal Generation
solutions.description: Currently, proposals require hours of manual input. Our system provides complete, branded proposals in 47 seconds.

solutions.title: Brand Consistency
solutions.description: Manual proposals risk inconsistency. Our system ensures every proposal aligns perfectly with your brand guidelines.

solutions.title: Enhanced Client Insights
solutions.description: Client data often sits unused. Our system analyzes and incorporates it to tailor each proposal, increasing relevance.

solutions.title: Cost Reduction
solutions.description: High labor costs drain your budget. Our automated system slashes these expenses, redirecting funds to innovation.

solutions.title: Real-Time Tracking
solutions.description: Currently, proposal follow-ups are manual and slow. The system provides real-time tracking, allowing you to act swiftly.

proposal1.whyUsIntro: Four reasons this works. Not marketing claims. Engineering facts.

whyUsCards.title: Speed
whyUsCards.description: Every hour your team spends writing proposals is an hour not spent closing deals. This system gives those hours back. Lead data in, live proposal out, 60 seconds.

whyUsCards.title: Personalization
whyUsCards.description: Generic proposals get ignored. Personalized proposals close. The system reads each prospect's website and reflects their services, tone, and positioning back to them. Written from scratch, not templated.

whyUsCards.title: Ownership
whyUsCards.description: No monthly subscription bleeding your budget. No vendor deciding to raise prices or shut down. You own the source code, the infrastructure, and the data. Permanently.

whyUsCards.title: Support
whyUsCards.description: Personal onboarding, a video walkthrough your team can reference anytime, and one week of post-delivery support. You are not left figuring this out alone.

fearCards.title: You are probably thinking: our stack is complicated.
fearCards.sub: CRM, email, Sheets, Slack. The system connects to whatever you already use. No migration.

fearCards.title: You might be wondering if this breaks your current workflow.
fearCards.sub: It runs alongside everything you have. Nothing changes except the time you spend on proposals.

fearCards.title: You are concerned the output will not match your standards.
fearCards.sub: Revisions are part of the build. We configure, test, and refine until the output matches your bar exactly.

proposal1.teamIntro: Your point of contact. No handoffs, no account managers, no layers.

team.name: Ayush Chauhan
team.bio: Full-stack engineer specializing in AI automation for agencies and service businesses. Every engagement personally handled from architecture through deployment. 15+ systems built. Zero failed deliveries. Works async, ships fast.

proposal1.processIntro: What Working With Us Looks Like

process.title: Kickoff (Async or Call)
process.description: We map your workflow, services, and current proposal process. Can be a 15-minute call or handled entirely over email. By the end, we have everything needed to configure the system.

process.title: System Configuration
process.description: The engine gets configured with your services, pricing structure, tone of voice, and brand standards. Every proposal it generates will sound like your best strategist wrote it.

process.title: Build and QA
process.description: Test proposals generated and reviewed against your quality bar. Refinements continue until the output is indistinguishable from what your team produces manually.

process.title: Deployment and Handoff
process.description: Deployed to production with full infrastructure. You receive a video walkthrough, documentation, and complete source code. From this point, the system runs without us.

proposal1.pricingIntro: Two options. Both are one-time builds. No subscriptions, no recurring fees. You own the source code and infrastructure permanently.

pricing.name: Proposal Engine
pricing.subtitle: // Core System
pricing.description: Custom proposal automation configured for Seeaoc's services, voice, and pricing structure.

pricing.name: Engine + AI Chatbot
pricing.subtitle: // Recommended
pricing.description: Everything above, plus an AI sales assistant embedded in every proposal. Handles objections, answers questions, and books calls for Seeaoc around the clock.
features: AI chatbot on every proposal page

proposal1.ctaHeadline: See this running on your actual proposals.
proposal1.ctaDescription: Reply here or email Ayush directly. He will send the onboarding form. Takes about 10 minutes and the build starts the same day. Custom-configured for Seeaoc.

proposal2.heroHeadline: Unlock Acme Corp's Potential Through AI Automation Excellence.
proposal2.heroSubheadline: Seeaoc will transform your operations with a comprehensive AI-driven strategy, optimizing every facet of your business.
proposal2.problemsIntro: Acme Corp is currently experiencing significant revenue losses due to inefficiencies.

problems.title: High Customer Churn
problems.description: Every customer leaving is money lost. Acme Corp's churn rate is 15%, costing an estimated $500,000 annually.

problems.title: Low Conversion Rates
problems.description: A 2% conversion rate means 98 out of 100 visitors are not converting. This results in a loss of potential revenue of $300,000 per quarter.

problems.title: Operational Inefficiencies
problems.description: Manual processes lead to a 20% decrease in productivity, equating to $200,000 in annual losses.

problems.title: Data Mismanagement
problems.description: Inaccurate data handling results in poor decision-making, costing Acme Corp $150,000 yearly in missed opportunities.

problems.title: Delayed Product Launches
problems.description: Every delayed launch costs $100,000 in market opportunity loss each month.

problems.title: High IT Costs
problems.description: Legacy systems are expensive, leading to an additional $250,000 in unnecessary IT costs annually.

proposal2.solutionIntro: Our solutions directly address these challenges to recover lost revenue and improve efficiency.

solutions.title: AI Automation
solutions.description: Streamlines operations, reducing manual work by 30% and saving $200,000 annually.

solutions.title: Data Analytics
solutions.description: Enhances decision-making by providing accurate insights, reducing missed opportunities by 50%.

solutions.title: Process Optimization
solutions.description: Improves productivity by 25%, addressing operational inefficiencies and saving $150,000 annually.

solutions.title: IT Modernization
solutions.description: Reduces IT costs by 20% through updated infrastructure, saving $200,000 annually.
